channel.title: Storage on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Storage on Have an average day :|

item.title: Migrating Servers with Syncthing
item.description: I’m in the process of making time to migrate my blog (and some other things) to a better server and giving it some much-needed love to repair some of the broken links on here. So I thought I would take a moment and share some thoughts about Syncthing and perhaps a use for it that are not clear at first. First, Syncthing is amazing. It’s come A LONG way over the past year and it’s become my primary data sync solution.

item.title: Intel 520 'Cherryville' Series 240GB SSD Review in RAID 0 - Next Stop, Cherryville - Legit Reviews
item.description: To that extent, Intel has informed us that they are now the first and only 2.5″ SandForce drive manufacturer to have their drives ship with OEM computers which is a pretty big deal and an easy way to get a lot of drives out to consumers. via Intel 520 ‘Cherryville’ Series 240GB SSD Review in RAID 0 – Next Stop, Cherryville – Legit Reviews. I love it when performance parts go OEM.
